home.title: rewrite.so — Write freely. Send confidently.
home.description: Input-box-level AI rewrite engine. 3 styles, keyboard-only, never breaks your flow.

pricing.title: Pricing — rewrite.so

pricing.intro: Free works for occasional use. Go Pro when it matters — second-language writing, client replies, anything you post publicly. No surprise fees.

faq.a1: Each time you trigger rewrite.so (double-tap Shift in a supported input), one request is sent to the model and three style variants stream back. That counts as one rewrite against your quota.
faq.q2: Do you store the text I rewrite?
faq.a2: No. Inputs and outputs pass through but are never persisted — not in application logs, not in error reporters, not in analytics. See our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> for details.
faq.a3: Any signed-in user can configure a custom OpenAI-compatible base URL, model, and API key. When enabled, your text goes directly to your chosen provider (you pay them, not us), and the rewrites do not count against your monthly quota — only short-term abuse limits remain. Pro's value is the hosted model (no key to manage) plus 2,000/month and priority support.
faq.q4: What happens if I exceed my quota?
faq.a4: The next request returns a 429 with a clear "quota exceeded" message. Quotas reset at 00:00 UTC on the first day of each month. You can upgrade or set up BYOK at any time.
faq.a5: Yes, anytime, from <settings>your settings</settings> via the "Manage subscription" portal. You keep Pro access until the end of the current billing period. Refund within 14 days of first charge — see <refund>Refund Policy</refund>.
faq.a6: <creem>Creem</creem> is our Merchant of Record. They process payments, taxes, and refunds on our behalf. Your card details never touch our servers.

contact.intro: We're a small team. Email is the fastest way to reach us; we typically reply within 1–2 business days.

card3.heading: Privacy & data requests

card5.heading: Source & issues

byok.title: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)
byok.intro: Plug in your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint and key. Rewrites go directly to your provider and don't count against your hosted-model monthly quota. Your key is stored AES-GCM encrypted and never written to logs.
byok.deleteConfirm: Delete BYOK config? Rewrites will fall back to the default upstream and start counting against your monthly quota again.

testFailed.invalid_base_url: Base URL should not include /chat/completions — that's the endpoint path appended automatically.

billing.intro: 2,000 AI rewrites per month. 3 styles streamed in parallel. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) unlocks unlimited usage.

earlyBirdBadge.label: Early Bird · 90 days free + lifetime 70% off

hero.subHeadline: Double-tap Shift, get three native-quality rewrites — works in any language.
hero.polyglot: Any language in. Any language out.
hero.intro: Press <kbd>Shift</kbd> <kbd>Shift</kbd> in any input box. We give you three ways to say it. Pick one with <kbd>1</kbd> / <kbd>2</kbd> / <kbd>3</kbd>.

scenarios.bridge: This is what rewrite.so was built for
scenarios.useCase1: Writing in a language that isn't your first — learning, working, talking to overseas teammates.
scenarios.useCase2: Customer or client replies when the tone has to be just right.
scenarios.useCase3: Public posts — tweets, Reddit / HN comments, GitHub issues, PR descriptions.
scenarios.useCase4: Cold emails, apologies, hard conversations — places where one wrong word costs you.

compare.subtitle: Three styles, in the box you're already typing in, in under a second.
compare.caption: Feature comparison of rewrite.so against Grammarly, DeepL Write, and ChatGPT web.
compare.disclaimer: Comparison reflects publicly available information as of 2026-05. Competitor features and pricing change frequently — please verify with each vendor before deciding. We do not affiliate with or endorse any listed product.

inline.label: Inline in any input box
inline.detail: We replace the text you're typing right where you're typing it — no popover, no sidebar, no second tab.

speed.label: Streaming output, no batch wait
speed.detail: Tokens stream in as the model produces them — the architecture never blocks on a full batch. Actual latency depends on the upstream model; what we guarantee is that you never wait for a complete response before you can start reading it.

candidates.label: Three styles in parallel (faithful / casual / formal)
candidates.detail: You get three rewrites at once. Press 1, 2, or 3 to accept — no need to re-prompt to see another tone.

logging.label: No prompt or output logging
logging.detail: We log length, language, style, user id, and error codes. Never the text. The source code is open.

byok.label: Bring your own API key (any OpenAI-compatible)
byok.detail: Plug in your own provider key and we don't apply our monthly quota — your provider's rate is your rate.

multilang.label: Multi-language source (CJK + EU)
multilang.detail: Designed for cross-language writers — type Chinese, get English back, or any combination across 7+ UI locales.

openSource.label: Open source
openSource.detail: Apache-2.0 on GitHub. Anyone can audit, fork, or self-host.

privacy.h2: Your text is never stored. Period.
privacy.body: Not in databases. Not in logs. Not in error reporters. Not in analytics. The text you rewrite passes through the worker once and is gone. We don't use any third-party APM (Sentry, Datadog, etc.) precisely because they'd capture request bodies by default. This is not a promise — it's the architecture, and the source code is open for you to verify.
privacy.shortBody: Only length, language, style, userId, and error codes can be logged. Original text and rewrite results are excluded everywhere.

step1.title: Double-tap Shift
step1.body: Press <kbd>Shift</kbd> twice within 500ms. Password / CVV / OTP fields are skipped automatically.

step2.title: 3 styles, parallel
step2.body: Faithful, casual, formal — three tones at once. The first one shows up almost instantly.

step3.title: Press to accept
step3.body: Number key replaces the input. ↑↓+Enter also works. Esc to dismiss. Double-tap Shift again to regenerate.

features.h2: Built for people who care about how it works

openSource.label: OPEN SOURCE
openSource.title: Read the code yourself
openSource.body: Self-host, audit, fork. The privacy claims above aren't marketing — they're code you can read at <repo>github.com/rewrite-so/rewrite.so</repo>.

byok.label: BYOK
byok.title: Bring Your Own Key
byok.body: Plug in your OpenAI-compatible base URL + key + model. Rewrites go directly to your provider, AES-GCM-encrypted at rest, never logged. Doesn't count against the monthly quota.

pii.label: HARD PII EXCLUSION
pii.title: Won't fire in password fields
pii.body: Password / cc-* / current-password / new-password / one-time-code / fields with name or id matching password|pin|cvv|cvc|otp|secret|token — all hard-coded to be ignored. Not a setting. Not a feature flag.

stack.label: STACK
stack.title: Cloudflare Workers + D1 + Hono
stack.body: Edge-deployed worker, OpenAI Chat Completions wire format, 3-way concurrent fan-out with cascading client-abort. ~5000 lines of TypeScript. Strict mode. No ORM for business tables.

crossLang.label: CROSS-LANGUAGE
crossLang.title: Translation is implicit
crossLang.body: Set a fixed target language or auto-detect from the page. Writing English in a Chinese email or Japanese in Slack? Just rewrite — translation happens silently.

keyboard.label: KEYBOARD-ONLY
keyboard.title: Never breaks your flow
keyboard.body: UI is invisible by default. Only an 8px translucent dot appears when an input is focused. Need it: double-tap Shift. Don't need it: it isn't there.

byok.title: BYOK
byok.feat1: No tier gate — any signed-in user
byok.feat3: Use OpenAI / Anthropic / Azure / Groq / DeepSeek

finalCta.body: No signup. Open /try for the demo. Install the extension to use it on supported sites.

chinglish.input: Please help me see this issue tomorrow.

candidate.faithful: Please help me look into this issue tomorrow.
candidate.casual: Could you take a look at this tomorrow?
candidate.formal: Could you please review this issue tomorrow?

zhToEn.input: 这个需求我今天可能做不完，明天上午给你更新。

candidate.faithful: I may not be able to finish this request today. I'll update you tomorrow morning.
candidate.casual: I might not get this done today, but I'll send you an update tomorrow morning.
candidate.formal: I may not be able to complete this request today, but I will provide an update tomorrow morning.

jaToEn.input: 明日の午前中までに確認して、更新します。

candidate.faithful: I'll check it by tomorrow morning and send an update.
candidate.casual: I'll take a look by tomorrow morning and keep you posted.
candidate.formal: I will review it by tomorrow morning and provide an update.

candidate.faithful: This seems incorrect. Could you fix it?
candidate.casual: I think something's off here. Could you take another look?
candidate.formal: This appears to be incorrect. Could you please review and correct it?

targetLang.title: Target language
targetLang.hint: "Auto-detect from page" infers the target from the current site. e.g. typing Chinese on an English site → translates the rewrites to English.

trigger.title: Enable Shift Shift trigger
trigger.label: Enable keyboard shortcut in input fields
trigger.hint: When off, the dot is hidden and double-Shift won't trigger.

byok.title: BYOK · Bring your own API key

loggedIn.title: Account
loggedIn.hint: Your target language and UI language are managed in your account on the web. Changes there sync to this extension automatically.

step1.title: Try double-tapping Shift
step1.body: Type something below, then double-tap Shift. This is the only gesture you need.

step2.title: Set the target language
step2.body: Rewrites are output in the target language. "Auto-detect from page" works for most people — typing Chinese on an English site auto-translates the rewrite to English.
step2.customHint: More options (custom dialects, accents, styles) available in Settings.

step3.title: Ready
step3.body: When you focus a supported web text field, a tiny dot appears bottom-right. Double-tap Shift to rewrite. Try it on:
